title: Beauty on main street
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - Ten years ago, \"after hearing too many opinions about the degradation of Main Road\", Knysna resident Stella Sohn decided to line the road with pots containing flowers, shrubs and trees.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - Ten years ago, \"after hearing too many opinions about the degradation of Main Road\", Knysna resident Stella Sohn decided to line the road with pots containing flowers, shrubs and trees."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"I set about raising sponsorship from the community and getting permission from the town engineer and landscaper, and Knysna in Bloom was born,\" she says.","html":"\"I set about raising sponsorship from the community and getting permission from the town engineer and landscaper, and Knysna in Bloom was born,\" she says."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"'We're still here'","html":"'We're still here'"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"I have faced many challenges over the years - theft, vandalism, damage (to pots) from vehicle accidents, people who view them (pots) as either seats or bins, but I haven't let any of this get me down, and we're still here, 10 years on. \"","html":"\"I have faced many challenges over the years - theft, vandalism, damage (to pots) from vehicle accidents, people who view them (pots) as either seats or bins, but I haven't let any of this get me down, and we're still here, 10 years on. \""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"'Tranquillity'","html":"'Tranquillity'"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Her \"mad idea\" has resulted in 70 pots being placed on either side of Main Road, beautifying it and bringing a welcome degree of tranquillity to the buzzing main thoroughfare.","html":"Her \"mad idea\" has resulted in 70 pots being placed on either side of Main Road, beautifying it and bringing a welcome degree of tranquillity to the buzzing main thoroughfare."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The pot plants 'cheer people up and enhance the street.","html":" The pot plants 'cheer people up and enhance the street."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"For the past five years, it has cost Sohn R3 000 a month to run the initiative.","html":"For the past five years, it has cost Sohn R3 000 a month to run the initiative."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"'Shouldering all costs'","html":"'Shouldering all costs'"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"I know the residents of Knysna value and appreciate the project and would be horrified if I closed it down, but it simply isn't sustainable for one person to shoulder the costs,\" she says.","html":"\"I know the residents of Knysna value and appreciate the project and would be horrified if I closed it down, but it simply isn't sustainable for one person to shoulder the costs,\" she says."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"\"For the first five years Knysna municipality funded the project to the tune of R12 000 a year, which covered Randall the car guard's wages - yes, he's still with us!"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Touch of colour.","html":"Touch of colour."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"Three times a week he waters, weeds and collects litter from all 70 pots. He has proved invaluable, and what lovely chap!","html":"\"Three times a week he waters, weeds and collects litter from all 70 pots. He has proved invaluable, and what lovely chap!"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"Twice a week my gardener, Timothy Nyirenda, helps him and replants when I need him to.\"","html":"\"Twice a week my gardener, Timothy Nyirenda, helps him and replants when I need him to.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"'Get no help from owners'","html":"'Get no help from owners'"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Pots have been placed outside the Knysna Mall, at the Woodmill Lane Shopping Centre, Demar Centre, Post Office, Shell garage, police station, and at many other buildings, including Oaks on Main.","html":"Pots have been placed outside the Knysna Mall, at the Woodmill Lane Shopping Centre, Demar Centre, Post Office, Shell garage, police station, and at many other buildings, including Oaks on Main."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"\"I do not receive any help from the owners,\" Sohn says."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"She has received \"hundreds of compliments from residents - these pots cheer people up and enhance the street\".","html":"She has received \"hundreds of compliments from residents - these pots cheer people up and enhance the street\"."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Knysna residents interested in helping Sohn to fund Knysna in Bloom, can contact her at 083 325 2581.","html":"Knysna residents interested in helping Sohn to fund Knysna in Bloom, can contact her at 083 325 2581."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
